user_query: I'm planning a cryptocurrency-themed event for my company. Help me find the latest details and market UUIDs for all active assets. It would also be great if you could provide me with the coins listed on the exchange with the UUID -zdvbieRdZ and their corresponding market details.

TaskList.description: Fetch the latest market details and UUIDs for all active cryptocurrency assets.
Retrieve the specific coins listed on the exchange with UUID -zdvbieRdZ along with their market details.
